name: PER_ALLOCATED_CHECKLISTS_
description: This table records the checklists allocated to a person. These may be copied from templates in PER_CHECKLISTS, but it is possible to override with values specific to the particular allocation.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Allocated Checklist Identifier

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ALLOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: CHECKLIST_ALLOCATION_ID

columns.Name: SECURITY_ENABLED
columns.Comments: SECURITY_ENABLED

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: CHECKLIST_LEVEL_CODE

columns.Name: ACCESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: ACCESS_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: INITIATOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Initiator person.

columns.Name: INITIATOR_USER
columns.Comments: Initiator user.

columns.Name: SELF_ASSIGNED_FLAG
columns.Comments: If checklist is self assigned.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: OBJECT_ID

columns.Name: ALLOCATION_NOTIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if a checklist assigned notification is sent.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_MODE
columns.Comments: Identifies if the checklist need to be processed with SOA/ESS.

columns.Name: DEF_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which the checklist completion is deferred.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for welcome notification.

columns.Name: FCL_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: FCL_TEMPLATE_ID

columns.Name: COMBINED_TASK_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for combined notification.

columns.Name: BACKGROUND_THUMBNAIL_URL
columns.Comments: BACKGROUND_THUMBNAIL_URL

columns.Name: BACKGROUND_IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: Background Image URL

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from legal entity.

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_INSTANCE
columns.Comments: CHECKLIST_INSTANCE

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Template Checklist Identifier

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Identifier for whom this checklist has been allocated

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment Identifier for whom this checklist has been allocated

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the Allocated Checklist

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the Allocated Checklist

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of the Allocated Checklist

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_STATUS
columns.Comments:
The status of the checklist. System Lookup: PER_CHECKLIST_TASK_STATUS
Values -
COM - Completed
INI - Initiated
DEF - Deferred

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: SYNCH_HISTORY
columns.Comments: SYNCH_HISTORY

columns.Name: CONTEXTUAL_ACTION
columns.Comments: CONTEXTUAL_ACTION

columns.Name: CONTEXT
columns.Comments: CONTEXT

columns.Comments: ALL_ROLES_VIEW_ASSIGNED

columns.Name: COMPLETED_ON
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CHECKLIST_CMP_ON
Values: ORA_MAND_COMPLETE- All mandatory tasks are complete.
ORA_MAND_WITH_OFFSET - All mandatory tasks complete with a grace period.
ORA_ALL_COMPLETE - All tasks are complete.
